texto: She's shed her skinsand plasma jeans, gets around in 2Kretro gear like the frock she wears today;a loose, white elegy to what's been lost.Already she's flowing back into herselfthe way a river flows to fill a creek bed.But some hard layer has washed awayand left her softer, more interested.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Lisa Jacobson.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “She's shed her skinsand plasma jeans, gets around in 2Kretro gear like the frock she wears today;…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, poetry, science-fiction pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de science-fiction.
